summary: v2.5.5 Unknown-Doc Reclaim sweep — full backend verification PASSED. 9/9 unit tests (mongomock-motor) + 7/7 live HTTP integration tests + 32/32 regression tests (drift_watchlist, auto_clear_unknown_guard, pattern_health_implicit_trust) + dashboard inbox-stats & learning/pattern-health/unified 200 OK.
critical_code_review_comments: Filter correctness validated: uses $and across doc_type / document_type / suggested_job_type (all three must be in UNKNOWN_DOC_TYPES). This fixes the earlier $or bug that treated missing fields as Unknown — confirmed by the AP_Invoice safety test passing.

BC evidence guard is a hard block ($and of $in [None,''] across all 4 BC fields) — verified with seeded TEST_iter227_bcsafe_* doc that had bc_purchase_invoice_no='TEST_PI-iter227' and remained at Completed.
Idempotency is enforced via reclaim_to_needs_review_at filter in _build_filter — verified end-to-end against the live preview DB.
Dry-run default (execute=false) is correctly non-mutating and returns the same shape as preview with added `execute: false` + `hint` fields.
Audit row in `unknown_doc_reclaim_runs` persists actor + reclaimed_count + ran_at — verified the ci_test run appears at top of /runs endpoint.
Minor: `limit` type in router signature is `int = Query(None, ...)` which works with FastAPI/Pydantic but would ideally be `Optional[int]`. Non-blocking.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_unknown_doc_reclaim_http.py (new — 7 live HTTP tests covering preview shape, dry-run zero-writes, execute+limit=1 mutation, safety for BC-evidence and known doc_types, idempotency, /runs endpoint, regression inbox-stats + pattern-health)
test_credentials: admin/admin (read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — not needed; admin endpoints are unauthenticated in preview env)
seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 ephemeral docs (TEST_iter227_<uuid>, TEST_iter227_bcsafe_<uuid>, TEST_iter227_ap_<uuid>) in gpi_document_hub.hub_documents. All cleaned up in module-scope fixture teardown (verified). The TEST_iter227_* candidate was picked up and reclaimed to NeedsReview during the execute run, then deleted — safe.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.5.5 Unknown-Doc Reclaim endpoints fully verified. total_candidates in the live preview DB is now 0 (previously 1 real candidate + 1 seeded test doc, both reclaimed to NeedsReview by ci_test and ci_test_idem actors). The unknown_doc_reclaim_runs collection has 2 audit rows from this iteration — safe to keep for audit trail. mongomock-motor 0.0.36 confirmed. The service module filter uses $and on all three doc_type fields (fixed from earlier $or bug).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 9 features/scenarios from the review request verified green.
